items.title: Goldman’s Latest Acquisition Is a $2 Billion Bet on Active ETFs
items.description: The bank said it would buy Innovator Capital Management, which specializes in so-called defined-outcome exchange-traded funds.

items.title: Amazon's Black Friday sales, Goldman Sachs acquires ETF issuer
items.description: Yahoo Finance Senior Producer John Hyland tracks Monday's top-moving stocks and biggest market stories in this Market Minute. Copper (HG=F) hit a record high, while silver (SI=F) continues its record-breaking rally. Goldman Sachs (GS) is acquiring Innovator Capital, an issuer of exchange-traded funds (ETFs), for $2 billion. Amazon's (AMZN) artificial intelligence (AI) chatbot, Rufus, helped drive Black Friday sales, according to data from Sensor Tower. Stay up to date on the latest market action, minute-by-minute, with Yahoo Finance's Market Minute.
